role: Defines the architectural rules and conventions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Establishes structural guidelines for the .spine directory and defines the purpose and maintenance boundaries of the .spine/rules directory, collectively ensuring consistent rule enforcement and project mirroring.
